channel.title: Torma Ltd. Documentation
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Torma Ltd. Documentation

item.title: Architecture
item.description: Torma Security Solutions Ltd. follows a two-part architecture: a static browser client and a PHP API backend connected through JSON over HTTP.

item.title: Backend API
item.description: PHP REST API - Authentication, Catalog, Orders, Reservations, and Admin OPEN tormasecurity.hu FOR AN INSTANT EXPERIENCE This project is a PHP REST API for the Torma Security Solutions application.

item.title: Database
item.description: The database schema and business logic live in API/database/torma.sql.

item.title: Frontend
item.description: The frontend is a static multi-page application in Web/ that consumes the REST API directly from browser-side JavaScript.

item.title: Torma Security Solutions Ltd. Website Documentation
item.description: Torma Security Solutions Ltd. is a full-stack web application for home and business security services.

item.title: Security
item.description: Security in Torma Security Solutions Ltd.

item.title: Setup
item.description: This guide explains how to run Torma Security Solutions Ltd. locally with the same defaults expected by the frontend and backend code.

item.title: Testing
item.description: Testing is currently driven by manual API and UI validation using the checklist in API/tests/TESTS.md.
